title: linecraft
description: Experience Minecraft in a 3-block wide line!
body:
# Linecraft 
![Badge showing the amount of downloads on modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?color=2d2d2d&colorA=5da545&label=&suffix=%20downloads%20&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/QxmE7srW&style=flat&logo=modrinth&logoColor=2d2d2d)

![A player lies in bed, secure in their nearly 2D house](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QxmE7srW/images/c2e3d77066bb48d8eaf2e1be3c602590aa96c0a0.png)

Experience **Minecraft 1.21.11+** in a **3-block wide line**! Across all dimensions, blocks will only generate (and be placeable) inside the line, and that's about it.

# Requirements
- [Minecraft 1.21.11+ with Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

This mod is only required on the server/host or in singleplayer, it's optional on the client-side but without it blocks you attempt to place outside of the line will appear to vanish from your inventory until you relog.

# [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/linecraft-mod/gallery)
![Mining a jungle tree in a 3-block wide world](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QxmE7srW/images/bfe79f745ae5a47ad909356094a01aab447ed7ca.png)
![3-block wide nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/QxmE7srW/images/60c6f702b3de8d518d341008600e88f91f9f97db.png)

# [Source Code](https://github.com/belsifox/linecraft)
